Automate your lights through four daily: Automate your lights through four daily phases
A role is a group of devices that should: A role is a group of devices that should behave the same way during each phase of the day. Instead of configuring every lamp individually, you assign lamps to a role and control them together.
Your lights transition automatically bet: Your lights transition automatically between these phases based on time, sunrise/sunset, or light level.
Select lux sensors to enable light-aware: Select lux sensors to enable light-aware transitions and twilight dimming.
Adjust when each phase starts. Time cond: Adjust when each phase starts. Time conditions are shown below; solar and lux conditions can be edited in the advanced config.
Adjust when each phase starts. Time and: Adjust when each phase starts. Time, solar and lux conditions are editable below.
Tip: Add a lux condition to MORNING to s: Tip: Add a lux condition to MORNING to skip wake-up lights when it's already bright.
No roles yet. Add your first role to get: No roles yet. Add your first role to get started.
Saved! Your lights will now follow the c: Saved! Your lights will now follow the configured phases.
Choose a preset to get started quickly.
On in Morning & Evening, off at Night &: On in Morning & Evening, off at Night & Day
When enabled, indoor lux controls this r: When enabled, indoor lux controls this role's brightness during the selected phases. Outside those phases, the on/off settings above apply. Tip: leave Night unchecked to ensure lights stay off at night.
Example: create a 'Living Room' role wit: Example: create a 'Living Room' role with your sofa lamp and ceiling light, then set them to dim to 30% in the EVENING and turn off at NIGHT.
Each phase schedule must have at least o: Each phase schedule must have at least one condition.
Lux dimming must have at least one activ: Lux dimming must have at least one active phase selected.
Dim value must be between 0 and 1.
Lux threshold must be a non-negative num: Lux threshold must be a non-negative number.
